reviews.review_title: was stuck on first screen/ now I'm good
reviews.review_description:
My initial review stated "looks like i have to click on forward or back boxes/ but nothing happens.  Help."

Well I finally figured it out... you select box by pointing to and highlighting the box and pushing the A controller button.  It would be good if those instructions were readily available. Otherwise app does exactly what it's supposed to.
Play on a cloudy day and it is a lot of fun. Do not play when it is too bright or dark. Major workout
The game is pretty good and that's all I had to say recommended
The next stage of MR. Great use of Oculus Head set. Actually a great fun way to work out. I felt like I got a work out in with 30 min of play outside. Does have to be cloudy for it to work the best.
